case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. SPW LOGISICS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210081964) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED APR-24-2024, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE APR-29-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT SPW LOGISICS LLC
DECLARATION OF BENJAMIN SEEMAN IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 73732910) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210069942) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 73421289) AS TO DEFENDANT SPW LOGISICS LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210069942) / COMPLAINT FOR MONEY: 1. OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT 2. ACCOUNT STATED 3. REASONABLE VALUE 4. BREACH OF CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPW LOGISICS LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-18-2024
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73732910) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210069942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $422.38 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 73732910) AS TO DEFENDANT SPW LOGISICS LLC
DECLARATION OF ERIC J. JUN RE METHOD OF CALCULATING INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 73732910) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION RE ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1717 (TRANSACTION ID # 73732910) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPW LOGISICS LLC $20,467.22 PRINCIPAL, $2,375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,482.14 INTEREST, $422.38 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,746.74, SEE SCANNED DOC
